message:
refactor: refine global design system with violet accents and enhanced depth

Comprehensive design system refinement moving from pure sky-blue to violet/purple accents
with improved depth, texture, and glassmorphism effects.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
COLOR PALETTE EVOLUTION
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Selection Styling:
BEFORE: Sky-blue (rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.25) + sky-50 text)
AFTER:  Violet (rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.3) + white text)
- Background: Sky-400 25% → Violet-600 30% (richer, more premium)
- Text: Sky-50 → Pure white (better contrast)
- Text shadow: 8px sky glow → 12px violet glow (more pronounced)
- Creates distinct brand moment when selecting text

Border Color Default:
- Global border: rgba(255,255,255,0.1) → rgba(255,255,255,0.08)
- Slightly more subtle, less harsh
- Better integration with dark backgrounds

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
TYPOGRAPHY & RENDERING
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

HTML Element Enhancements:
- Added text-rendering: optimizeLegibility (better kerning, ligatures)
- Font features: Added ss01, ss03 stylistic sets
  * ss01: More open letterforms
  * ss03: Geometric consistency
  * Creates modern, technical feel
- Added touch-action: manipulation
  * Disables double-tap-to-zoom on iOS
  * Improves touch responsiveness
  * Better mobile UX

Letter Spacing Refinements:
- Headings: -0.025em → -0.03em (tighter, more impactful)
- Paragraphs: -0.01em → -0.015em (improved density)
- Subtle but creates more refined appearance at scale

NEW Utility Class (.text-gradient):
- Tri-color gradient: sky → violet → emerald
- Background-clip: text for transparent color fill
- Ready for gradient headline effects
- Matches site's multi-color accent palette

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
BACKGROUND TEXTURES & DEPTH
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Noise Texture (body::before) Refinement:
BEFORE:
- baseFrequency: 0.65
- Opacity in SVG: 0.04, wrapper opacity: 0.5
- Combined: Very visible grain

AFTER:
- baseFrequency: 0.8 (finer grain pattern)
- Opacity in SVG: 0.03, wrapper opacity: 0.4
- Combined: More subtle, premium feel
- Less distracting, more texture than noise

Ambient Gradients (body::after) Repositioning:
BEFORE:
- Top-left: 15% 0% (near edge)
- Top-right: 85% 0% (near edge)
- Bottom: 50% 100%
- Linear: #020617 → #0f172a (slate-900)

AFTER:
- Top-left: 10% 10% (more inset, localized)
- Top-right: 90% 20% (offset down, more natural)
- Bottom: 50% 90% (pulled up slightly)
- Linear: #020617 → #0B1120 (deeper, richer blue-black)
- Reduced opacity on all gradients (0.08→0.06, 0.05→0.04)

Effect:
- More subtle, sophisticated lighting
- Violet accent at top-right (not just sky-blue)
- Gradients feel like ambient light sources, not overlays
- Better depth perception

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
GLASSMORPHISM COMPONENTS
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

.glass-panel Refinement:
BEFORE:
- Background: rgba(2,6,23,0.6) - quite opaque
- Blur: 12px
- Border: rgba(255,255,255,0.08)
- Inset highlight: rgba(255,255,255,0.05)
- Hover: Darker background, stronger border

AFTER:
- Background: rgba(2,6,23,0.4) - more transparent
- Blur: 16px (stronger blur for true glass effect)
- Border: rgba(255,255,255,0.06) - more subtle
- Inset highlight: rgba(255,255,255,0.03) - refined
- Hover: Removed (not all panels are interactive)

Philosophy:
- True glassmorphism is translucent, not opaque
- Heavier blur creates depth
- Subtle borders prevent harshness

NEW .glass-card Class:
- Background: rgba(15,23,42,0.3) - slate-900 base
- Blur: 12px (moderate)
- Border: rgba(255,255,255,0.05) - very subtle
- Shadow: Layered shadows for depth
- Transition: 0.4s cubic-bezier (smooth, elegant)

Hover State:
- Background: 0.3 → 0.5 opacity (brightens slightly)
- Border: 0.05 → 0.08 opacity
- Transform: translateY(-2px) (subtle lift)
- Shadow: Enhanced multi-layer:
  * Subtle white ring (0.05 opacity)
  * Deep shadow (32px, high opacity)
  * Sky-blue color bleed (0.1 opacity) - NEW
- Creates premium, interactive card feeling

Use Cases:
- .glass-panel: Static background panels
- .glass-card: Interactive content cards (projects, features)

.floating-chip Refinement:
- Border shadow: 0.2 → 0.15 opacity (more subtle)
- Box shadow: 0.3 → 0.25 opacity (less harsh)
- Maintains animation, refines visual weight

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
UTILITY CLASSES
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

NEW .no-scrollbar Class:
- Hides scrollbars on overflow containers
- Cross-browser support:
  * Webkit: ::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none }
  * IE/Edge: -ms-overflow-style: none
  * Firefox: scrollbar-width: none
- Use case: Horizontal scroll containers on mobile
- Maintains functionality, removes visual clutter

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
DESIGN PHILOSOPHY SHIFT
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

From: Sky-blue technical aesthetic
To: Violet/purple premium aesthetic with multi-color accents

Rationale:
- Violet: More premium, less common than blue
- Multi-color: Sky + Violet + Emerald creates richness
- Depth: Layered shadows and glows create 3D feeling
- Subtlety: Reduced opacities throughout for refinement
- Glass: True translucency, not fake frosted effects
- Modern: Matches current design trends (iOS, Vercel, Linear)

Impact:
- More sophisticated, less generic
- Better depth perception with layered effects
- Improved text readability with refined tracking
- Premium feel without being overwhelming
- Better mobile UX with touch optimizations

Technical Benefits:
- GPU-accelerated backdrop filters
- Proper color hierarchy (violet > sky > emerald)
- Cross-browser scrollbar hiding
- Optimized text rendering
- Touch-first interactions
